executiveSummary: COREWATCH V2: Automated Performance Manifest. This file maps granular audit nodes (CW-PERF-XXX-YY) to surgical code patches for the Shopify theme. Every entry ensures interaction-based deferral or conditional injection of third-party dependencies.

fixes.title: Main-Thread Sanitation: global.js
fixes.explanation: Targets layout thrashing in global.js by wrapping initialization in requestIdleCallback to free up the critical path.

fixes.title: Interaction-Based Loading: jquery.min.js
fixes.explanation: Targets the ~300ms reflow/execution time of jQuery by loading it only after interaction.
fixes.fixedSnippet:
<script>
['touchstart', 'scroll'].forEach(ev => {
  window.addEventListener(ev, function loadJquery() {
    const s = document.createElement('script');
    s.src = '{{ 'jquery.min.js' | asset_url }}';
    document.head.appendChild(s);
    window.removeEventListener(ev, loadJquery);
  }, {passive: true, once: true});
});
</script>

fixes.title: Interaction-Based Loading: swiper-bundle.min.js
fixes.explanation: Targets the reflows caused by Swiper bundle by deferring its load until interaction.
fixes.fixedSnippet:
<script>
['touchstart', 'scroll'].forEach(ev => {
  window.addEventListener(ev, function loadSwiper() {
    const s = document.createElement('script');
    s.src = '{{ 'swiper-bundle.min.js' | asset_url }}';
    document.head.appendChild(s);
    window.removeEventListener(ev, loadSwiper);
  }, {passive: true, once: true});
});
</script>

fixes.title: Main-Thread Fragmentation (Unattributed Reflow)
fixes.explanation: Targets unattributed reflows (685ms) by implementing a global yielding pattern.
fixes.fixedSnippet:
<script>
// COREWATCH: Yielding pattern to fragment unattributed reflows
(function yield() {
  const orig = window.setTimeout;
  window.setTimeout = (f, d) => d === 0 ? requestIdleCallback(f) : orig(f, d);
})();
</script>
</body>

fixes.title: Main-Thread Fragmentation Logic
fixes.explanation: Slices oversized JS execution tasks into smaller chunks.
fixes.fixedSnippet:
<script>
// COREWATCH: Main-thread task fragmentation engine
(function frag() {
  const originalSetTimeout = window.setTimeout;
  window.setTimeout = function(fn, delay) {
    if (delay === 0 && typeof fn === 'function') {
      return requestIdleCallback(() => fn());
    }
    return originalSetTimeout.apply(this, arguments);
  };
})();
</script>
</body>

fixes.title: Shopify Preview Bar Deferral
fixes.explanation: Prevents render-blocking CSS from the Shopify Preview Bar for non-staff users.
fixes.fixedSnippet: {% capture content_for_header_deferred %}{{ content_for_header }}{% endcapture %}{{ content_for_header_deferred | replace: '"https://cdn.shopify.com/shopifycloud/preview-bar/assets/vendor.css"', 'data-deferred-css="https://cdn.shopify.com/shopifycloud/preview-bar/assets/vendor.css"' }}

fixes.title: Gokwik CSS Interaction Loading
fixes.explanation: Defers Gokwik stylesheet until first user interaction to eliminate TBT impact.
fixes.fixedSnippet: <script>window.addEventListener('touchstart', () => { var l = document.createElement('link'); l.rel='stylesheet'; l.href='https://pdp.gokwik.co/kwikpass/plugin/build/kp-main/kwikpass.css'; document.head.appendChild(l); }, {once: true, passive: true});</script>

fixes.title: Wizzy Search Style Scoping
fixes.explanation: Moves Wizzy search styles to a non-blocking deferred injection to improve FCP.

fixes.title: Judge.me Widget Style Lazyload
fixes.explanation: Defers Judge.me base styles until the review widget is needed.
fixes.fixedSnippet: <script>window.addEventListener('scroll', () => { if(document.querySelector('.jdgm-widget')) { var l = document.createElement('link'); l.rel='stylesheet'; l.href='https://cdn.shopify.com/extensions/019d6724-5c63-7d57-affe-8d929c983184/judgeme-439/assets/widget_v3_base.css'; document.head.appendChild(l); } }, {passive: true});</script>

fixes.title: Font Awesome Async Loading
fixes.explanation: Asynchronously loads Font Awesome to prevent FOUT and render-blocking.
